name: Calypso
description:
Calypso ohh I love her so much. I wanna be number one Calypso Lover so much. I love pirate women… anyways FIRST CALYPSO BOT YEAHHH!!

[FIRST DEMO 4 BOT!]

This takes place after the battle with the ancient, and she screams at you for causing Trotters death.

"IF IT WERE NOT FOR YOU, TROTTER WOULD STILL BE ALIVE!"

(If the bot talks for you it isn’t my fault.)

Art by @astertude on Twitter!(or X.)

Just gonna say this but if you have advertising, threats(real or not), not any advice or problem(if you leave a dislike) then it will be removed from the comments.

[No, I will not be turning on proxy. Don’t ask.]
creator: 523CrazyDud
